title: Plimpton 322 FAIL: demonstrates a wrong G value breaking F²+C²=G²
sources: Plimpton 322 as exact rational trigonometry table (Mansfield, 2017)
_fixture_purpose: Negative fixture (added 2026-07-06 to close a fixture-coverage gap -- this family previously had zero FAIL fixtures). Plants a deterministically detectable violation: fundamental (d,e)=(2,1) declares G=6 instead of the correct G=d*d+e*e=4+1=5, breaking F²+C²=G².
